reviews: Best dentists in town. Dentistry of Uptown Charlotte really knows what they're doing.
Called them on short notice and they delivered. Professional, on time, fair pricing.

description: Dentistry of Uptown Charlotte provides professional dentists to the Charlotte area. With years of experience and a commitment to quality, we deliver results that exceed expectations. Contact us today for a free consultation.
